---

title: "Get metric value"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get metric value"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/actuator/metrics/{metricName}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the current value(s) for a specific Micrometer metric.

  as={"h2"}
